case_title: GREGORY HUANG VS. CITI APARTMENTS, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,300.00 FILED BY HUANG, GREGORY AS TO DEFENDANT CITI APARTMENTS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-06-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUANG, GREGORY ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-06-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-06-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK P. SCHREIBER. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITI APARTMENTS, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUANG, GREGORY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITI APARTMENTS, INC. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT MET HIS BURDEN OF PROOF AS TO DAMAGES AND LIABILITY OF THE DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
